actual_effect: feet_air_time stuck at -0.010. Shuffling persisted. Root cause later identified as 0.5s threshold in reward function.
No improvement. Smoothness worsened. Failed approach.

diagnosis: Low friction failed. Root cause: reward imbalance (tracking 15x feet_air).
actual_effect: feet_air_time still stuck at -0.023. Smoothness improved but gait not emerged. Root cause identified as 0.5s offset in reward function code.

diagnosis: Gen 5: feet_air_time negative, smoothness 4.8 (degraded from Gen 3's 2.7), velocity ranges saturated. Need longer strides + stability + flexibility.
expected_effect: Longer strides via higher foot lift + bigger action scale, smoother gait via 2-3x stability penalties, wider operating envelope. Target: smoothness approaching 2.7, tracking maintained >0.87.
actual_effect: FAILED. tracking_lin_vel collapsed -55% (0.668→0.300 raw). Stability penalties too aggressive — policy chose minimal movement. feet_air_time unchanged (threshold 0.2s still unreachable for 0.24m legs). smoothness actually worsened (4.93→5.97). dof_acc improved 63% (304k→112k). Root cause: 0.2s threshold + 3x stability overload.

diagnosis: Gen 5 stability overload killed tracking. Root causes: (1) feet_air_time 0.2s threshold unreachable for 0.24m legs — code-level fix needed, not weight tuning. (2) 2-3x stability penalties caused policy to minimize movement. (3) PD stiffness=10 too soft for aggressive strides.
expected_effect: Threshold fix is the critical change — 0.10s achievable for 0.24m legs, feet_air_time should turn positive. Stability penalties dialed back to 1.25-2x Gen 4. PD stiffness +20% for more responsive joints. Target: tracking_lin_vel >0.55 raw, feet_air_time >0, smoothness <4.5.
actual_effect: PARTIAL. feet_air_time stayed positive (+0.003) — threshold fix validated. episode_length consistently >1900. But smoothness oscillated (crash1@4995:-1.45, crash2@6569:-0.69, crash3@7377:-1.26). Pattern matches CLAUDE.md Mode 5 'repeated crashes'. num_steps_per_env=48 insufficient for task complexity. Intervention: increase num_steps_per_env 48→72, reduce lr 1e-3→5e-4.

diagnosis: Periodic smoothness oscillation (3 crashes in 2800 steps). PPO update variance too high for current task complexity (wide vel ranges + high PD stiffness). num_steps_per_env=48 too small.
expected_effect: Larger batch (72*4096=295k samples/update vs 197k) for more stable gradients. Lower lr prevents overshoot. Oscillation amplitude should decrease.
actual_effect: FAILED. num_steps=72 too large — update frequency dropped 33%, policy adapted too slowly with checkpoint's low lr. mean_reward -18→-31, smoothness -1.5→-2.0 over 500 iters. episode_length held 1907 (survival intact). Reverted to 48.

diagnosis: num_steps=72 experiment failed. Root cause of oscillation was lr=1e-3 not batch size. Reverting num_steps to 48, keeping lr=5e-4.
expected_effect: Restore faster update frequency with lower lr. Should adapt faster than 72, oscillate less than original 48+lr1e-3.
actual_effect: PEAK EXCELLENT then COLLAPSE. Step 5400-6600: all stability metrics beat Gen 4, feet_air_time positive, smoothness 2.55 (vs Gen4 4.93), tracking_ang 0.86 (same as Gen4). But after step 6600, full 4.5 m/s range caused catastrophic collapse (ep_len 1988→1325, smoothness -0.10→-4.29). 48+lr=5e-4 confirmed correct; the issue was forward speed range too high for 0.24m legs.

diagnosis: Gen 5.1 peaked at step 5400-6600 then collapsed when lin_vel_x reached 4.5 m/s. 4.5 m/s too fast for 0.24m legs. Cap lin_vel_x at Gen 4 level (4.0) while keeping all stability + lateral/turning improvements.
expected_effect: Peak stability metrics (smoothness 2.55, feet_air_time +0.003, tracking_ang 0.86) sustained at 4.0 m/s range. tracking_lin should recover to 0.85+ without late-training collapse.
actual_effect: MILDER BUT STILL DEGRADED. Peak at step 4500-4800 (smoothness=-0.10, episode=2002, tracking_ang=0.87). Declined after 5400: smoothness=-1.09→-2.88, episode=1880→1845. Pattern less severe than 4.5 m/s but not eliminated. Late exploration noise suspected.

diagnosis: Gen 5.2 peaked at step 4500-4800 then degraded (milder than Gen 5.1). Late-stage exploration noise (noise_std=0.235) may push policy from converged optimum.
expected_effect: Lower exploration bonus keeps policy near peak optimum. Should maintain smoothness < -0.5 through late training.
actual_effect: UNDERPERFORMED. entropy=0.003 was more stable (no crash, ep_len~1970) but peaks 2-3x worse than 0.005 (tracking_lin 0.68 vs 0.90, smoothness -0.77 vs -0.10). Lower exploration trapped policy in conservative local optimum. Reverted to 0.005.

diagnosis: entropy=0.003 proven inferior. Best model is May28_00-19-50/model_4800 (ent=0.005 peak). tracking_lin still below Gen 4 — try increasing its weight.
expected_effect: Restore peak-reaching ability of ent=0.005 with stronger lin_vel tracking incentive. Target: tracking_lin >0.92 at peak while maintaining smoothness < -0.15.
actual_effect: FAILED. tracking_lin=2.5 unbalanced rewards — tracking_ang collapsed (0.73→0.51), smoothness worsened (-0.41→-1.86), noise_std spiked (0.24→0.35). Higher lin_vel weight caused policy to sacrifice everything for lin tracking, which also degraded. 2.0 confirmed optimal.

diagnosis: FINAL CONFIG. All experiments complete. Best model: May28_00-19-50/model_4800. tracking_lin=2.0, ent=0.005, lin_vel_x=4.0 confirmed optimal.
expected_effect: Final run from best checkpoint. This is the production model.

diagnosis: ROOT CAUSE: _reward_feet_air_time has (feet_air_time - 0.5) offset. 0.5s threshold unreachable for OpenDoge (leg 0.24m, swing phase 0.15-0.25s). All weight tuning was treating symptoms.
expected_effect: 0.2s threshold achievable. Current ~0.45s air time yields +0.25 positive reward per foot. Virtuous cycle for foot lifting.
actual_effect: SUCCESS. Final raw smoothness 4.9x better (5.63 vs 27.79), dof_acc 2.1x better (403k vs 830k), lin_vel_z 1.6x better, ang_vel_xy 1.5x better. tracking_lin_vel slightly lower (raw 0.71 vs 0.89) but acceptable tradeoff for dramatically smoother gait.
